narrative:
Dunham East (precinct in Washington County) has 992 registered voters, with 61.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.6 percentage points.
